old_value: {"id":"kautil-egb","title":"Add audioread fallback for audio loading","description":"Implement dual-backend audio loading: try soundfile first, fall back to audioread+ffmpeg for formats soundfile can't handle (MP3, OGG, WebM). Currently kautil only supports formats soundfile can read natively. See autil/audio_loader.py for reference implementation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:39Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:39Z"}

{"id":"kautil-9xn","title":"Add two-stage speaker change verification","description":"Improve speaker change detection with verification step: first check if energy diff exceeds threshold, then verify by comparing average energy of 2 windows before vs after. See autil/segments.py:detect_speaker_changes() for reference. More accurate detections.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:53Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:53Z"}

{"id":"kautil-0ng","title":"Add format_summary() for human-readable output","description":"Add a format_summary() function that prints a nice human-readable report with: file info, loudness (integrated LUFS, LRA, loudest/softest), silence regions count with first few timestamps, speaker changes count, solo regions count. See autil/analyzer.py:format_summary() for reference.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:50Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:50Z"}

{"id":"kautil-hjk","title":"Extract orchestrator module (analyzer.py)","description":"Move analysis coordination logic from cli.py to a separate analyzer.py module. Should include: analyze_audio(), save_results(), format_summary(). See autil/analyzer.py for reference. This improves code organization and testability.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:48Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:48Z"}

{"id":"kautil-rpv","title":"Add relative silence threshold","description":"Change silence detection to use dB relative to max RMS (like autil) instead of absolute dB. This makes threshold more adaptive to different recording levels. See autil/silence.py for reference implementation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:55Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:55Z"}

{"id":"kautil-30r","title":"Add test fixtures (conftest.py)","description":"Add pytest fixtures for test audio generation: sample_rate, mono_audio, stereo_audio, silence_audio, mixed_audio, short_audio. See autil/tests/conftest.py for reference. Makes tests cleaner and more maintainable.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"maphew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:52Z","created_by":"matt wilkie","updated_at":"2026-03-07T00:40:52Z"}
